stemHtml: What physiological effects of altitude hypoxia are expected at 22 000 ft?

options.a: Night vision may start to be impaired.
options.b: Breathing 100% oxygen without positive pressure will NOT be sufficient to preserve the full mental capacity of a pilot.
options.c: When breathing ambient air, the blood oxygen saturation decreases to 90%.
options.d: The pilot will lose consciousness when he is not using supplemental oxygen.
